text: In this dimly lit, modern space, I sense a strange blend of anticipation and isolation. The empty chairs and glass walls hint at collaboration and progress, yet the lack of people makes me feel like an outsider trespassing in a sanctuary of innovation. The vivid 'R+D' (Research and Development) inscription illuminates a commitment to discovery, yet I am left questioning if true innovation happens here or merely the idea of it. I feel small yet contemplative, detached but quietly inspired in this place of silent potential.
